---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**Is your feature request related to a problem?**
A clear description of the problem (e.g. "my agent can't do X during the match").

**Describe the solution you'd like**
What you want to happen — a new tool, a new data field, another sport, etc.

**Alternatives considered**
Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

**Additional context**
Add any other context, links to data sources, or MCP host details here.
